mapper.update:
UPDATE delivery_order
order_number = #{orderNumber},
reagent_id = #{reagentId},
reagent_name = #{reagentName},
batch_id = #{batchId},
quantity = #{quantity},
operator_id = #{operatorId},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_number, reagent_id, reagent_name, batch_id, quantity, operator_id, operator_name, delivery_time, status, approver_id, approver_name, approval_time, rejection_reason, remark FROM delivery_order WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_order ( order_number, reagent_id, reagent_name, batch_id, quantity, operator_id, operator_name, delivery_time, status, approver_id, approver_name, approval_time, rejection_reason, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{reagentId}, #{reagentName}, #{batchId}, #{quantity}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{deliveryTime}, #{status}, #{approverId}, #{approverName}, #{approvalTime}, #{rejectionReason}, #{remark} )
